mapper.select:
SELECT b.report_id, b.report_title, b.author_name, b.read_date,
b.report_regdate FROM book_report b WHERE b.member_idx = #{member_idx} ORDER BY b.report_id DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE book_report
report_title = #{report_title}, author_name = #{author_name}, publisher = #{publisher}, read_date = #{read_date}, report_text = #{report_text}, report_image1 = #{report_image1}, report_image2 = #{report_image2}, report_image3 = #{report_image3},
is_public = 10
WHERE report_id = #{report_id} AND member_idx = #{member_idx}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM book_report WHERE report_id = #{report_id} AND member_idx = #{member_idx}
